ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the node on the blockchain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., validator, delegator) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the node */,
  "staking_but_not_delegating" REAL /* Amount staked but not delegated */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the node was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the node was last updated */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain network the node belongs to */,
  "reward_structure" TEXT /* Reward structure for the node (e.g., fixed, percentage-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staking" (
  "staking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staking event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that made the stake */,
  "estimatedICX" REAL /* Estimated ICX value of the stake */,
  "stake" REAL /* Amount staked */,
  "totalDelegated" REAL /* Total amount delegated */,
  "unstake" REAL /* Amount unstaked */,
  "unstakeBlockHeight" INTEGER /* Block height at which unstaking occurred */,
  "remainingBlocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks remaining until unstaking is complete */,
  "staking_date" TEXT /* Date the stake was made */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward earned from the stake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staking_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegations" (
  "delegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that received the delegation */,
  "delegator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delegator */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount delegated */,
  "delegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was made */,
  "undelegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was undelegated */,
  "delegator_share" REAL /* Share of the delegator in the node's rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegations_delegator_id FOREIGN KEY ("delegator_id") REFERENCES delegators ("delegator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegations_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegators" (
  "delegator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the delegator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the delegator on the blockchain */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegator was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the delegator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_performance" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "uptime" REAL /* Uptime of the node (in percentage) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the node (in seconds) */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the node (in transactions per second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id", "performance_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "staking_rewards" (
  "staking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staking event */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staking_id", "reward_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the node operator */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the node operator was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the node operator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_operator_nodes" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node operator */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "management_date" TEXT /* Date the node operator started managing the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id", "node_id")
)
